issues.title: init: Routines prompts are not self-contained for remote CCR
issues.summary: Scheduled update and digest runs fail in the remote CCR environment because the emitted prompts assume the plugin is already installed.

groups.label: Enhancements
groups.description: Proposed additions and larger behavior changes.

issues.title: init: backfill journal with dated posts from commit history
issues.summary: Partition a new install's git history into cadence buckets and produce one dated post per bucket so the journal arrives lived-in rather than empty.

issues.title: Add sourceCommit/sourceFiles frontmatter so update can detect stale content
issues.summary: Anchor generated files to the repo state that produced them so the update mode can tell what actually needs regenerating.

issues.title: Add a 'suggest' skill that files feedback as a GitHub issue
issues.summary: Structured intake that lets users file Docent feedback without leaving Claude Code — config and version attached, secrets redacted.

groups.label: Documentation
groups.description: Prompt wording, procedure steps, and schema notes that need tightening.

issues.title: Prompt and procedure refinements found during init dogfooding
issues.summary: Four sub-items: inaugural-voice guidance, tone examples per content type, empty-state contract, harness-independent shell command in init Step 5.
